headline: The Bull Case For Amcor (AMCR) Could Change Following Seaweed-Based Coatings Tie-Up With Kelpi
summary: In late June 2026, Amcor announced a collaboration with U.K.-based startup Kelpi to test seaweed-based, bio-derived coatings aimed at improving barrier performance and recyclability in its AmFiber™ fiber-based packaging range. This partnership highlights how Amcor is looking to expand renewable, recyclable packaging options by pairing Kelpi’s seaweed coating platform with its global R&D and manufacturing scale. We’ll now examine how Amcor’s push into seaweed-based bio-coatings could...
